summary: Navigation & Structure unified admin page - All features verified working. Route at /admin/navigation-structure loads correctly, all 4 tabs (Navigation, Shop Tabs, Categories, Filters) functional with add/edit/delete capabilities. WebsiteHub shows single consolidated card.
critical_code_review_comments: NavigationStructureManager.jsx is well-structured at 838 lines - consolidates 4 separate admin pages cleanly
All interactive elements have proper form controls and dialogs
WebsiteHub.js correctly shows single Navigation & Structure card with consolidated description
context_for_next_testing_agent: Navigation & Structure unified page fully functional. All 4 tabs tested: Navigation (Add Link, Save), Shop Tabs (Add Tab, Save, Preview), Categories (6 Groups, 34 Categories, Add Group, Add Category, Move to Group), Filters (7 filters with Add, Edit, Delete). All dialog modals open and close correctly with proper form fields.

elements: Nav item row with Label/URL inputs
